vae_vs_lda_iia.interpretation: Positive mean_diff = VAE subspace produces higher IIA than LDA. Wilcoxon signed-rank tests whether the improvement is significant.

alpha_vs_vae_iia.interpretation: Positive rho = low-dimensional (high-alpha) regions have higher VAE IIA.

uncertainty_vs_iia.interpretation: Negative rho = regions where the VAE is confident about the choice subspace also have higher IIA (subspace is genuinely causal).

vae_lda_subspace_agreement.interpretation: Small distance = VAE and LDA find similar subspaces (VAE validates LDA). Large distance = VAE finds a different, potentially better subspace.
